case_title: SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER VS MAR DEWEY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAR DEWEY

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAR DEWEY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
